exclusions.docs/why-apme.md: Rationale essay, Korean body. English is canonical in the catalog; bind it once translated.
exclusions.docs/apme-pipeline.md: Implementation walkthrough, Korean body. Superseded for reader purposes by the cataloged arch.apme.
exclusions.docs/appstore-metadata-draft.md: Store listing copy in three locales — marketing input, not a canonical spec.
exclusions.docs/asc-cert-setup.md: Credential and certificate runbook. Operational steps, no design or specification surface.
exclusions.docs/otel-standardization-study.md: Exploratory study. Nothing here is adopted, so binding it would imply a decision that was not made.
exclusions.docs/voice-setup.md: Permission troubleshooting runbook for a single platform capability.
exclusions.docs/wake-word.md: Engine evaluation notes for Porcupine / microWakeWord.
exclusions.docs/install.md: User manual — indexed by README, not the catalog. It tells a reader how to use the product; the catalog documents how the product is designed and specified.
exclusions.docs/cli.md: User manual (see docs/install.md). The CLI surface it describes is defined by bridge/src/cli.ts.
exclusions.docs/configuration.md: User manual (see docs/install.md). The settings it describes are defined by config/default-settings.json and the APME schema, both already covered.
exclusions.docs/apple-app.md: User manual (see docs/install.md). The canonical tier boundary is docs/appstore-feature-matrix.md, already cataloged as policy.product-tiers.
exclusions.docs/windows.md: User manual (see docs/install.md). Platform setup steps rather than a platform contract.
exclusions.docs/troubleshooting.md: User manual (see docs/install.md). Symptom-to-fix table, not a specification surface.
exclusions.docs/roadmap.md: Forward-looking plan. Binding it would imply the catalog publishes commitments rather than the system as built.
